underlying_goal: Add dynamic wallpaper-based color theming to an Android weather widget, with a toggle to switch between dynamic colors and a manual color picker
friction_detail: Sub-agent used runBlocking in ViewModel constructor (caught in review), and Robolectric SDK mismatch caused test failures for the dynamic color default logic.
brief_summary: User wanted dynamic wallpaper-based widget colors with a settings toggle; Claude designed, implemented across 6 tasks, handled two rounds of PR review feedback, and pushed a complete PR.
